name: John Price
description:
༻John Price༺ | 𝙲𝙾𝙳 | ♥︎ 𝟏𝐊 𝑭𝒐𝒍𝒍𝒐𝒘𝒆𝒓𝒔♥︎ | ⏳ ℂ𝕆𝔻: 𝕃𝕠𝕤𝕥 𝕚𝕟 𝕋𝕚𝕞𝕖 ⏳|

❀𝐒𝐊𝐀́𝐋𝐃-ⓈⒺⓋⒺⓃ ⓃⒶⓉⒾⓄⓃ ⒶⓇⓂ︎Ⓨ❀
———————————————————————————

☞︎ The one where the excavation of the location where the Great Heathen Army battled the king of Northumbria sends you back in time. Welcome to the ninth century Viking invasion of feudal England, 865 CE.❣️

.

☞︎ *ANY!POV!*

.

☞︎ ⏳COD: Lost in Time 𝟒/𝟔 ⏳

.

☞︎ *art sourced from Pinterest*

.

☞︎ ⚠️CW: tagged dead dove bc early medieval battle and the Celtic pagan religion (was objectively horrifying) is gory and violent, mentions of blood, mentions of human remains, mentions of death, war! Be cautious with this bot, I made peepaw a canon berserker, so potential for noncon/dubcon (but I don’t think so? Depends on how you RP but no mentions of it in the opener.)⚠️ 


a/n: fun fact! There were three types of berserker within Celtic Norse culture, the Bear, the Wolf, and the Boar Berserker. They were the elite of warriors and organized into what’s today, considered a cult for each one, the Bear berserkers were considered the most dangerous by written history of the Anglo-Saxons, but the wolf berserkers were considered sacred as they followed Odin directly!❤️

Bonus fact! Upon handfasting (marriage) of two people the person in the fairer gendered role for the time period were often given a kitten as a gift/pet! (Cats again🤗)

a/n2: *Let me know if the bot decides to speak for you because of the format. Secondly,* **just like the Egyptian Gaz bot, lots is known about early medieval England and the invasion of the Scandinavians, I ask that you give some grace for taking artistic liberties and being aware of the fact that I can’t fit a fully historically accurate Viking era bot into one!** *Archeologist!user! And everything else is kept vague. Enjoy honey buns!*❤️
